headline: Biggest Industrial IPO Since 1999, And Investors Are Buying
summary: It is the largest U.S. IPO of 2026 and the largest IPO in the industrial sector since UPS raised $5.5 billion in 1999.

headline: Madison Air Up 16% After Biggest US Industrial IPO Since ‘99
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Madison Air Solutions Corp. shares rose 16% after the company raised $2.23 billion in the biggest US listing of an industrial firm in close to three decades.Shares of the provider of ventilation and filtration systems traded at $31.26 as of 1:07 p.m. Thursday afternoon in New York, compared to the initial public offering price of $27 each. The company sold 82.7 million shares after marketing them for $25 to $27 apiece. The trading gives the Chicago-based company a market value of

headline: UPS projects to boost capacity at 3 Asia air hubs
summary: UPS is investing large sums of money to expand capacity at three key air hubs in its Asia-Pacific network despite a lower capex budget for the corporation as a whole. The post UPS projects to boost capacity at 3 Asia air hubs appeared first on FreightWaves.

headline: New Ownership of Pak Mail in Austin, Texas Brings Fresh Energy to the Business--Serving the Community with Shipping and Office Services for More Than 20 Years
summary: Annex Brands, Inc., a leading franchisor in the packing, shipping, and office services industries, is pleased to announce the successful transfer of ownership of an existing Pak Mail location in Austin, Texas to new owner, Marcos Reynaga. This transition to new ownership ensures that the community will benefit from the essential shipping and office services provided by this Pak Mail for over the last 20 years.

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trading the truce and the Lebanon dilemma
